mapper.insert: INSERT INTO practice_sessions (user_id, part, topic, topic_prompt, topic_source, season_label, allow_ai_expand, session_state_json, status, started_at, ended_at, is_deleted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{part}, #{topic}, #{topicPrompt}, #{topicSource}, #{seasonLabel}, #{allowAiExpand}, #{sessionStateJson}, #{status}, #{startedAt, typeHandler=com.speaker.app.mybatis.typehandler.InstantMillisTypeHandler}, #{endedAt, typeHandler=com.speaker.app.mybatis.typehandler.InstantMillisTypeHandler}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE practice_sessions SET user_id = #{userId}, part = #{part}, topic = #{topic}, topic_prompt = #{topicPrompt}, topic_source = #{topicSource}, season_label = #{seasonLabel}, allow_ai_expand = #{allowAiExpand}, session_state_json = #{sessionStateJson}, status = #{status}, started_at = #{startedAt, typeHandler=com.speaker.app.mybatis.typehandler.InstantMillisTypeHandler}, ended_at = #{endedAt, typeHandler=com.speaker.app.mybatis.typehandler.InstantMillisTypeHandler}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted} WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM practice_sessions WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM practice_sessions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM practice_sessions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE practice_sessions SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
